title: Mobcrafter
description:
Turn your block creations into controllable units.
Build structures, capture them, and command them like an RTS army in Minecraft.
body:
![MobCrafter Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1447/397/topbanner.png)

## Turn your block creations into controllable units
Build structures, capture them, and command them like an RTS army in Minecraft.

---

## What is MobCrafter?

MobCrafter is a Forge mod that lets you  
**turn block-built structures into a single controllable unit entity**.

Instead of spawning mobs, you **create units yourself using blocks** —  
then capture, summon, and command them in the world.

You can:
- Build any structure using vanilla blocks
- Capture it as unit data
- Summon it as a living entity
- Control it using commands and tools

No modeling tools. No external editors. Just building.

---

## Unit Sharing Portal

MobCrafter includes **no pre-made units by default**.  
Instead, units are shared through the official portal:

👉 https://mobcrafter.net/
  and
 https://www.patreon.com/c/omro500?vanity=user

You can:
- Download community-made unit JSON files  
- Reuse or modify units for your own worlds  
- Share your creations with others  

Unit files are loaded from: config/mob_crafter/units/

New units can be added at runtime without restarting.  
In multiplayer, server-side units are synced to all clients.

> MobCrafter is under active development.  
> Features, balance, and performance may evolve over time.

---

## How to Use

MobCrafter lets you turn **block-built structures** into **RTS-like units**.  
No modeling tools required — just build, capture, and summon.

---

### 1. Build a Structure

![Structure](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1447/303/structure.png)

Build any structure you like using normal Minecraft blocks.  
The shape, size, and design are entirely up to you.

---

### 2. Place a Bone Block

![Set](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1447/304/set.png)

Attach a **Bone Block** to your structure.  
This block acts as the **core / pivot** of the unit and is required for capture.

![Bone Block Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/1447/320/310/172/recipe_boneblock.png)

---

### 3. Capture the Structure

![Capture](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1447/305/capture.png)

Use the **Capture Tool** on the Bone Block.  
The entire connected structure will be saved as **unit data**.

![Capture Tool Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1447/322/recipe_capturetool.png)

> Capturing does **not** destroy the original structure.

---

### 4. Summon the Unit

![Summon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1447/306/summon.png)

Once captured, the structure can be **summoned as a unit**.  
Consider it a living entity you can control.

![Summon Core](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/1447/321/310/172/recipe_summoncore.png)
![Summon Menu](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/1447/333/310/172/summonmenu.png)

---

## Unit Control Tools

MobCrafter provides tools for commanding your units.

---

### Commander Wand (Area Command)

![Commander Wand](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1448/442/commanderwand-1-png.png)

- Controls multiple nearby units
- Right-click: open command menu  
- Left-click: give attack direction  
- Commands include: Follow, Guard, Patrol, Hold, Retreat  

Units inside your command range will respond together.

---

### Marshal Wand (Squad Control)

![Marshal Wand](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1447/324/recipe_marshalwand.png)

- Assign units into squads  
- Units in the same squad move and act together  
- Useful for managing formations and organization  

Commander Wand = issuing orders  
Marshal Wand = structuring your army

---

## Editing & Customization (Optional)

MobCrafter works without any editing,  
but offers deeper customization if you want.

### In-Game Editing (GUI)
- Rename units  
- Adjust behavior  
- Modify basic combat values  

![GUI1](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1448/438/editbasic-png.png)
![GUI2](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1448/439/editmove-png.png)
![GUI3](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1448/440/editattack-png.png)

---

### Advanced Editing (JSON)

Each unit is stored as a JSON file.  
You can edit:
- Stats (health, attack, cost, etc.)
- Behavior parameters  
- Custom balancing  

JSON editing is **optional**.  
You can enjoy MobCrafter without touching any files.

---

## Tips

- Simple shapes work best for beginners  
- Large structures are supported  
- Captured structures are not destroyed  
- Experiment freely and creatively  

---

## Summary

Build → Set → Capture → Summon  

MobCrafter turns your imagination into playable units.  
Create your own army — from blocks.

---

## Supported Version

- Minecraft Forge **1.20.1**
